title: Meadow's Compact Font
description: Makes the letters prettier and easier to read.
body:
Love the classic **Minecraft look** but wish the text was just a bit **cleaner**? This resource pack provides a subtle **Vanilla-friendly overhaul** of the **default font** without increasing the resolution. What’s Changed: - **Cleaner Letters**: Removed unnecessary serifs for a smoother, less cluttered appearance - **More Compact**: Slimmer glyphs for improved readability and tighter spacing - **Subtle Shading**: Slightly darker lower sections add depth while staying true to vanilla
**Version 2.0 is out now!**
This pack is licensed under CC BY-NC-ND 4.0. You are free to share it as long as you credit me, do not use it commercially, and do not make any modifications.
